job_description:
# Data Quality Analyst
Company: ServiceTitan
Source: LinkedIn
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 27, 2026
URL: https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-quality-analyst-at-servicetitan-4387434200

## Highlights
- Remote data quality analyst role in software/data migration work.
- Posted 2 weeks ago.
- Emphasizes T-SQL, ETL operations, customer-facing data migration support, database interpretation, and data correction queries.
- Good functional overlap on data quality and SQL, though the role is more implementation and migration oriented than Swagatika's strongest-fit roles.
strengths: Functional overlap on SQL, ETL operations, data correction, and data migration quality.
Good cross-functional and customer-facing communication match.
Remote and within the last 60 days.
gaps: Basic T-SQL is asked, but the role is very migration/implementation heavy rather than analytics-forward.
Less direct overlap with healthcare reporting and enterprise ETL validation than higher-ranked roles.
notes: Borderline but valid miss under all-domain search. Tailor toward SQL, data interpretation, mapping, quality corrections, and stakeholder communication. Keep the score moderate.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Data Quality Analyst | SQL | Data Migration Support | Validation

replacements.find: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare (payer), banking, retail, and e-commerce domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines. Proven partner to engineering, QA, and business stakeholders—translating mapping documents and business rules into validation frameworks that protect reporting accuracy, regulatory compliance, and downstream analytics readiness.
replacements.replace: Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across complex business environments. Deep hands-on expertise in SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Strong fit for roles that require structured data interpretation, correction, validation, and stakeholder communication.
